title: Product Manager — Enterprise SaaS Analytics Platform
description_raw:
DataViz Ltd are looking for an experienced Product Manager to own the product roadmap and feature delivery for their enterprise SaaS analytics product. This is a 6-month contract role inside IR35 via umbrella.

You will work with the engineering team and design team to define and prioritise features for the analytics dashboard, working in 2-week sprints using agile methodology.

Key responsibilities:
- Own the product roadmap and backlog for the SaaS analytics platform
- Run sprint planning, sprint reviews, and retrospectives with the engineering team
- Gather requirements from key customers and translate to user stories
- Work with the UX designer and UI designer on product experience improvements
- Report product health metrics (MAU, NPS, churn) to the leadership team

Profile:
- 5+ years product management experience in SaaS or cloud software
- Familiarity with Jira, Confluence, Figma
- No engineering background required

Rate: £500/day inside IR35
Duration: 6 months
Start: 18 August 2026
Location: London (hybrid — 2 days office)
